text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Oh, wazzup? Did ya come all this way just for me?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
You betcha! I respect you a lot, so I've been
practicing a special song for you all week!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Now that's what I call style!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Let's hear it then. Ya better dazzle me with
somethin' as loud and flashy as Edo fireworks!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Yes, ma'am! Bamboo Memory presents... your
birthday song!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
HAPPY! BIRTHDAY! THANK YOUU! FOR BEING
BORN! YEAH!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
INARI! SHE'S THE BEST! STRONGER THAN! ALL
THE REST! WOOOOO!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Haha! Soundin' more like a chant to me! Thanks
Bamboo, ya hit me straight through the heart!
